creator: jcfyecrayz@liamekaens.com
text:
I am opening this bug to track / understand why net/dante was marked BROKEN recently.

The commit message said:

"
    net/dante: mark BROKEN

    checking read/send-side pipe system... =>> Killing runaway build after 7200 seconds with no output
"

I just built on 12-stable/amd64 and i386, and there was no runaway problem.  It configured and built fine:

checking read/send-side pipe system... recvbased

I have not tried 13.x or 14.x (current) yet.

Does anyone have more details about this?  On what system is the runaway happening?

There does appear to be some additional history.  See bug 202197 and bug 192295.
